samples.The meaning of life is: The meaning of life is that we have choices to make and we are in control. The other part of our experience is the people around us who are constantly trying to shape what happens to them. samples.Once upon a time there was a: Once upon a time there was a man named Sam. He lived in a small village called Peket, and had a big family of his own. One day, while walking through the woods, he saw something strange happening – a huge tree with roots growing all over it. It looked very big but also very young and green.
